clarity.notes: PRD follows a clear product narrative from positioning to flows, modules, data, calculations, notifications, and roadmap.

hierarchy.notes: Core scenes and MVP scope are separated from settings, export, and future capabilities.

typography.notes: Markdown headings and tables make the document easy to scan.

motion.notes: Interaction requirements cover page transitions, form feedback, notification overlays, and chart updates at PRD level.

brand.notes: Requirements preserve the lightweight commercial mobile style and avoid overly technical positioning.
